description: Compound table component for displaying structured data. Provides styled semantic HTML table elements with emphasis/alignment variants, sort indicators, row selection states, horizontal scrolling, and sticky columns. Data logic (sorting, filtering, pagination) is the consumer's responsibility.

Table.description: Root wrapper. Outer div provides horizontal scroll container, inner table uses full width.

TableHeader.description: Table header section. Applies header background. Header rows do NOT have row hover interaction.

TableRow.description: Table row with hover and selected states. Selected applies primary tint background.

selected.description: Selected row background (primary tint). Sets aria-selected.

TableHead.description: Header cell with optional sort indicator. Sortable headers render an internal button for accessibility.

sortDirection.description: Sort state. undefined = non-sortable column. false = sortable but unsorted. 'ascending'/'descending' = active sort.

onSort.description: Sort toggle handler. When provided with sortDirection, header becomes clickable.

sticky.description: Fixed column via position: sticky. Applies opaque background and right border.

TableCell.description: Data cell with emphasis hierarchy and alignment. Strong for key identifiers, Normal for general text, Weak for empty/no-data.

emphasis.description: Text emphasis. Strong = semibold + darkest, Normal = regular + medium, Weak = regular + lightest.

sticky.description: Fixed column via position: sticky. Inherits row background.

hover.headerRow: No row hover (per Figma). Sort header cell only has hover styling.

sortDirection.ascending: Sort icon rotated up, active color. Header text uses --comp-table-header-text-sorted. aria-sort=ascending
sortDirection.descending: Sort icon rotated down, active color. Header text uses --comp-table-header-text-sorted. aria-sort=descending
sortDirection.default: Both arrows (neutral icon), subtle color. aria-sort=none

implementation.stateOverlay: CSS hover/active on <tr> directly (not span overlay — <tr> cannot contain non-td children).
implementation.stickyColumn: CSS position: sticky + opaque background (bg-inherit for body cells, explicit bg for header cells) + right border --comp-table-border-sticky.
implementation.sortInteraction: 3-state cycle: Default → Descending → Ascending → Default. Internal <button> in <th> for keyboard a11y (Enter/Space).
implementation.selectionNote: No built-in checkbox. Consumer renders their own checkbox in TableCell. TableRow.selected controls visual state only.
